title: Cleanup & Deprecation
summary: Deleted old databases and backups (not deprecated per V). Consolidated CRM/deal agents from 7 to 3. Verified unified n5_core.db functioning.
learnings: CC'ing va@zo.computer already triggers conversations, so scanning for CC'd emails is redundant. SQLite silently creates new empty DBs when connecting to non-existent paths - deletion is cleaner than deprecation.
concerns: Many legacy scripts still reference old paths - they will error if run, which is correct behavior.

agents_updated: Deal Sync Hub (806f7fcc) - absorbed Notion sync + email scan
